step.name: measure
step.action: Count LOC + token count; check > 80 lines or > 200 LOC threshold.

step.name: classify-concerns
step.action: Tag lines as render / logic / I/O / state.

step.name: plan-extractions
step.action: Walk the tree → pick extractions (hooks / services / subcomponents).
step.decision-gate: If no extraction reduces the component < 80 lines, escalate — may need rewrite.

step.name: execute
step.action: Per extraction: move code, update imports, run tests, commit.

step.name: wire-tests
step.action: Add unit tests for extracted hooks/services; mock I/O.
